# ICTF — ICT Foundation, Sri Lanka

> O/L & A/L ICT tuition, online Zoom classes, and an islandwide paper center network.
> Founder: Vithoosan Sivanathan. Headquarters: Jaffna, Sri Lanka.
> Contact: info@ictf.lk | +94 77 459 1161 | https://ictf.lk

## About

ICT Foundation (ICTF) is Sri Lanka's trusted tuition provider for Ordinary Level (O/L) and Advanced Level (A/L) ICT education. Classes are delivered live via Zoom with optional past-paper practice at partner paper centers across districts. The ICTF Student Portal provides video lessons, resources, results, leaderboard, and AI study support.

Legal name: ICT Foundation (Pvt) Ltd
